prompt_text.compare-books: Compare head-to-head odds for tonight's AFL game across the bookmakers.
prompt_text.find-value: Scan my models against current prices — any value out there? Watch it if so.
prompt_text.nba-finals: What's the latest NBA Finals result, and who leads the series?
prompt_text.platform-tour: Give me the tour — what can this platform actually do?
prompt_text.arb-scan: Scan for cross-book arbitrage right now — explain what you found, or why a clean board is the honest norm.

compare-books.answer:
### Western Bulldogs v Adelaide — head to head, 7 books

| Book | Bulldogs | Adelaide |
|---|---|---|
| Pinnacle | 1.73 | **2.12** |
| Sportsbet | 1.73 | **2.12** |
| TAB | **1.74** | 2.10 |
| Unibet | 1.78 | 2.06 |

Best available: **Bulldogs 1.78 at Unibet**, **Adelaide 2.12 at Pinnacle** — a 2.9% spread between best and worst on the away side. Line's been stable for 6 hours.

_sources: 7 mapped bookmakers via fixture resolution, fetched just now_

find-value.answer:
### One edge worth your attention

**Bulldogs v Adelaide — total under 165.5 at 1.96 (TAB)**
- Model **afl-totals v3** (calibrated, Brier 0.187) makes it **55.8%** → fair odds 1.79
- That's a **+9.4% edge** at TAB's price; best alternative 1.92 elsewhere
- Line has drifted 2 points since open — the market is moving *toward* the model

Set a standing watch: you'll get pinged if the edge grows past 12% or vanishes.

_model: your calibrated holdout, not a hunch · edges decay — verify before acting_

platform-tour.answer:
### The whole desk, in one place

- **Cross-book pricing** — the same match under every bookmaker and prediction market (Kalshi, Polymarket), best price first, with full line-movement history
- **Standing watches** — line moves, steam, value and **cross-book arbitrage** alerts pushed to Slack or Discord the moment they fire, then re-measured for honesty
- **Models & backtests** — train calibrated models on captured prices, then replay them honestly: entry at prediction time, CLV measured against the sharp close
- **Fantasy optimiser** — projections plus a deterministic salary-cap solver, cash or GPP
- **Build your own agents** — describe what you want in plain English; it wires the data, skills and budgets, versioned so upgrades never break you

Every answer is grounded in live tool results, with sources attached — across **21 providers, 40+ sports, 1,200+ markets**.

_pick any other prompt above to see one of these in action_

arb-scan.answer:
### Scanned 312 fresh boards across 11 venues — no arbitrage right now

That's the honest norm: real arbs are rare and short-lived. Every "monster margin" a naive scanner would scream about is filtered here by construction:

- **in-play games** (one stale leg + one live leg fakes huge margins no one can take)
- **delisted markets** (every leg must have been seen *listed* in the last hour)
- **mismatched events** (women's/U23 variants never merge with the senior fixture)

When a genuine pre-game arb ≥1% appears — including **exchange-vs-book** (Kalshi contract one side, bookmaker the other) — the standing watch fires a Slack or Discord alert within 5 minutes, with per-leg books, odds and the equalised stake split. Five minutes later it re-measures the same board and records whether the margin was still takeable — so the weekly report tells you how actionable the alerts really are.

_gross margins — exchange fees, limits and timing are never priced in_
